query: SELECT li.description, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.totalPrice, m.matchedItemName FROM invoiceLineItems li JOIN invoiceLineItemMatches m ON m.invoiceLineItemId = li.id WHERE m.inventoryItemId IS NOT NULL AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 ORDER BY m.matchedItemName LIMIT 20;
